_readme: Consumed by the reusable `claude-sandbox` launcher. Each listed path is shadowed by a project-keyed Docker volume so the Linux container's installs/builds stay container-only and never clobber the macOS host's copies (and vice-versa), while the source tree stays bind-mounted and live. Root node_modules + the pnpm store are isolated by the launcher automatically; this list adds this monorepo's per-package dirs. See docs/claude-sandbox.md.
